indemnification.label: Indemnification / Hold Harmless
indemnification.description: Obligation of one party to compensate the other for losses or damages

limitation_of_liability.label: Limitation of Liability
limitation_of_liability.description: Caps or restricts the liability of one or both parties

non_assignment.label: Non-Assignment
non_assignment.description: Restriction on transferring rights or obligations under the agreement

non_compete.label: Non-Compete / Restrictive Covenant
non_compete.description: Restriction on competing activities during or after the agreement

termination.label: Termination / Expiration
termination.description: Conditions and procedures for ending the agreement

governing_law.label: Governing Law / Jurisdiction
governing_law.description: Which jurisdiction's laws govern the agreement

force_majeure.label: Force Majeure
force_majeure.description: Excuses performance due to extraordinary events beyond control

change_of_control.label: Change of Control
change_of_control.description: Rights and obligations triggered by ownership changes

representations_warranties.label: Representations & Warranties
representations_warranties.description: Statements of fact and promises about the state of affairs

entire_agreement.label: Entire Agreement / Integration
entire_agreement.description: Clause stating the document is the complete agreement

severability.label: Severability
severability.description: If one provision is invalid, the rest of the agreement survives

waiver.label: Waiver / Amendment
waiver.description: Conditions for waiving rights or modifying the agreement

notice.label: Notice / Notification
notice.description: Requirements for providing formal notices between parties
